questions.prompt: If the drone won't arm, what is the most reliable way to find out why?
options: Connecting to Betaflight and looking at the arming flags (arm disable reasons) on the Setup screen; Betaflight tells you the reason directly
questions.explanation: Betaflight shows the reasons preventing arming in the arming flag list (for example THROTTLE, ANGLE, RX_FAILSAFE). Connecting and looking at the flags is the fastest fix, instead of guessing.

questions.prompt: If only the 'THROTTLE' arming flag is lit in Betaflight, what is the fix?
options: Pulling the throttle stick all the way down (to zero)
questions.explanation: The THROTTLE flag indicates the throttle stick is up. For arming, throttle must be all the way down (at zero); pulling the stick to zero solves it.

questions.prompt: If the drone shakes in the air, what should be checked first, before touching the PID settings?
options: Mechanical causes such as the propellers (damaged/unbalanced prop, loose nut) and the motor
questions.explanation: The most common cause of shaking is a damaged/unbalanced propeller. The classic beginner mistake is to skip the mechanics and fiddle with the PIDs; check the prop/nut/motor first.

questions.prompt: If the goggle image is snowy or doesn't come through at all, what is the most common cause of video problems?
options: The goggles being on a different channel from the VTX (channel/frequency mismatch) or an antenna problem
questions.explanation: Video problems are in the video chain: the most common cause is the goggles and VTX not being on the same channel; a loose/broken antenna also degrades the image. (Powering the VTX without an antenna can burn the VTX.)

questions.prompt: What is the golden rule of troubleshooting?
options: Changing as many things as possible at the same time
Changing only one thing at a time and testing, so you know what worked
questions.explanation: The one-variable approach: change one thing at a time and test. If you change many things at once, even if the problem goes away you won't know which one fixed it.
